scene_summary: A dim archival foundry-studio with large marked wall panels, hanging character textile, lacquer drawers, a central folio stand, specimen bell jar, brazier, brass type machine, painted scroll, and paper-covered worktable surfaces suitable for interaction mapping.
usable_surfaces: large scarred linen wall with red loops and ink stains
dark incised slate wall panel on the right
foreground marked paper sheets on worktable

detected_objects.label: Scarred Linen Field Wall
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large upright beige wall surface covered with black rubbing-like stains, red circular loops, scratches, and handwritten marks.

detected_objects.label: Hidden-Message Slate Panel
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Tall dark rectangular wall panel at right with dense pale incised characters, scratches, and red line markings.

detected_objects.label: ASCII Comet Veil
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Suspended curved canopy of repeated small light marks or characters hanging under the high windows.

detected_objects.label: Surreal Book-Art Folio Carousel
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Central rotating stand with many vertical hanging illustrated paper leaves and a circular top frame.

detected_objects.label: East Asian Graphics Lacquer Cabinet
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Dark lacquered multi-drawer archive cabinet with gold decoration, drawer fronts, and small pulls.

detected_objects.label: Questioning Brazier
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Round black cast-iron vessel on a low stand with glowing coals and tools rising from the center.

detected_objects.label: Bluebell Fog Bell Jar
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Transparent glowing glass dome enclosing blue illuminated flowers and mist-like light.

detected_objects.label: Variable-Width Brass Type Loom
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large brass mechanical rack at lower right with many vertical letterform-like bars and rollers.

detected_objects.label: Cinematic Background Scroll
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Framed rear landscape painting or scroll showing dark mountains and misty water.

detected_objects.label: Foreground Marked Paper Sheets
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large pale sheets spread across the foreground table, visibly marked with red thread or drawn lines and stains.
